blocker.summary: No additional in-repo implementation work remains for BIG-GO-1098.

notes: The residual physical Python tests had already been removed before this branch; the delivered value is Go-only replacement of the remaining live planning, bootstrap, and documentation surfaces plus regression enforcement that keeps them clean.

src/bigclaw/planning.py remains part of the exported Python compatibility surface via src/bigclaw/__init__.py, so this lane intentionally converted its validation/evidence paths to Go without deleting the module.
No BIG-GO-1098 record exists in local-issues.json or the Symphony local issue store in this workspace, so any remaining active state is external to this repository.
